subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath destined for the service of His Cause! Letters from Adhirbayjan, Qazvín and Ṭihrán have been received and upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لخدمه امره مسطورات از آذربایجان و قزوین و طهران واصل و بر
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
